Statement: Oracle Fusion HCM Cloud SaaS only — no on-premises deployment
Risk_If_Invalid: Scope disputes if client expects on-premises options or hybrid deployment

Statement: Environment provisioning by Oracle; APPSolve timeline starts from environment access date
Risk_If_Invalid: Timeline slippage if Oracle provisioning delays are not tracked and escalated

Statement: Scoped to 1 Production + 1 standard non-production Oracle environment; additional non-production tenants must be explicitly licensed by client
Risk_If_Invalid: Cost overrun if client expects additional environments outside subscription

Statement: Oracle quarterly update schedule applies; client accepts updates may change UI or configuration behaviour
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbudgeted regression work if client refuses to accept quarterly updates

Statement: Client responsible for browser compatibility and VPN/network access for all users
Risk_If_Invalid: Access delays during testing and UAT

Statement: Client responsible for all employee internet connectivity; APPSolve not liable for network-related performance issues
Risk_If_Invalid: Disputes over performance degradation attributed to APPSolve

Statement: Oracle SaaS SLA governs production availability; APPSolve not responsible for Oracle platform downtime
Risk_If_Invalid: Unmanaged client expectations around uptime guarantees

Statement: Oracle CPU/patch bundles applied by Oracle during implementation are outside APPSolve scope; remediation is a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbudgeted rework during implementation if major Oracle patches alter delivered configuration

Statement: Configuration scope is based on entities, BUs, locations, and LDGs confirmed at scoping; scope changes require Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Scope creep and cost overrun as additional entities are added post-scoping

Statement: Client confirms final legal entities, BUs, departments, locations, and job structures before Scope and Design commences
Risk_If_Invalid: Design rework required if org structure changes after configuration has started

Statement: One LDG configured per country in scope; additional LDGs are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Under-scoped legislative configuration; incorrect payroll interface setup

Statement: APPSolve applies Oracle Modern Best Practice as default org design; deviations are assessed as Change Requests
Risk_If_Invalid: Cost overrun from bespoke org configurations not anticipated in estimate

Statement: Org design decisions (BU structure, dept hierarchy, position/job management, grade ladders) are client's responsibility and must be finalised before configuration
Risk_If_Invalid: Configuration built on unconfirmed design; rework costs at client's risk

Statement: Job Management is APPSolve default; Position Management excluded from base scope — requires explicit scoping and is priced as an addition
Risk_If_Invalid: Position management imposes significant additional complexity not priced in base estimate

Statement: Client confirms centralised vs decentralised HR model before security design commences
Risk_If_Invalid: Incorrect security configuration; rework after go-live

Statement: Single worker number sequence is the default; multiple sequences are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Unexpected configuration complexity and testing effort

Statement: Oracle seeded RBAC duty and abstract roles are the baseline; custom duty role modifications are out of scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Bespoke security development not priced in estimate; significant rework risk

Statement: 4 custom job roles included: Employee, Line Manager, HR Administrator, 1 additional custom role; roles beyond 4 are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbounded security design effort consuming implementation contingency

Statement: Client owns user provisioning process; APPSolve configures IDCS/OCI IAM SSO only where in SOW scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Identity management gaps; unmanaged user access after go-live

Statement: Client provides IdP access, technical contact, and SAML metadata for SSO configuration where SSO is in scope
Risk_If_Invalid: SSO integration delays due to client IdP access restrictions

Statement: Client responsible for data masking and POPIA compliance in non-production environments
Risk_If_Invalid: POPIA breach; reputational risk to APPSolve if personal data is exposed in test environments

Statement: Oracle TDE is an Oracle platform control; APPSolve references it in documentation but does not configure or certify it
Risk_If_Invalid: Incorrect client expectation that APPSolve provides TDE certification

Statement: Client or internal audit provides SoD conflict matrix; APPSolve configures roles as directed but does not conduct independent SoD audits
Risk_If_Invalid: Audit findings post-go-live attributed to APPSolve security configuration

Statement: Security profiles configured for agreed user populations; additional populations not identified in Scope and Design are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Security design is incomplete; access gaps discovered in UAT or after go-live

Statement: Approval workflows use Oracle BPM delivered patterns (management hierarchy, position hierarchy, approval group); bespoke routing logic is out of scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Complex routing requirements drive custom development cost not in estimate

Statement: Client provides all approval hierarchies, rules, and notification requirements before workflow configuration
Risk_If_Invalid: Workflow configuration delay; rework if approval logic changes after build

Statement: Number of distinct approval workflows is limited to those agreed in SOW; additional workflows are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbounded workflow design effort; delivery timeline impact

Statement: Email notifications use Oracle standard framework; custom HTML/branded email templates are out of scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expectation mismatch on notification appearance

Statement: Accurate management hierarchy data must be present in Oracle HCM before workflow UAT commences
Risk_If_Invalid: Workflow testing blocked; UAT delays

Statement: Standard Oracle delegation (out-of-office) included; permanent delegation hierarchies assessed as scope addition depending on complexity
Risk_If_Invalid: Permanent delegation rules require bespoke BPM configuration not priced in base

Statement: Client owns data extraction, cleansing, normalisation, and loading into APPSolve FBDI templates; APPSolve does not extract from client source systems
Risk_If_Invalid: Data migration delays; quality failures attributed to APPSolve

Statement: Only active employee records migrated; terminated employees, historical records, and unconfirmed contractor populations are excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: Unscoped data volumes; migration effort significantly exceeds estimate

Statement: APPSolve validates successful load only; source data accuracy is the client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Post-go-live data errors blamed on migration; reputational risk

Statement: Maximum three (3) migration load cycles (Mock 1, Mock 2, Production); additional cycles are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Repeated migration cycles consume significant consultant time not budgeted

Statement: Historical learning, performance, and payslip data excluded unless specifically agreed and scoped as additions
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes historical data is always migrated; scope dispute at delivery

Statement: Client performs data reconciliation between source and Oracle HCM after each load cycle
Risk_If_Invalid: Unreconciled data discrepancies discovered post-go-live; data integrity disputes

Statement: Migration data provided in English or agreed primary language; translated data values provided by client
Risk_If_Invalid: Multi-language migration complexity and cost not in base estimate

Statement: Client enforces data freeze on source system during production migration window
Risk_If_Invalid: Data divergence between source and Oracle HCM at go-live; integrity risk

Statement: Contractors, agency workers, and contingent workers excluded from default Core HR migration; inclusion requires agreement in Scope and Design
Risk_If_Invalid: Hidden data population inflates migration scope and effort

Statement: Standard OTBI reports and dashboards are the default reporting tool; OTBI is included in HCM Base licence
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expects advanced analytics not included in base HCM licence

Statement: Custom OTBI report count agreed in SOW; additional custom reports are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbounded custom reporting effort consuming implementation resources

Statement: Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC/OAX) is separately licensed and excluded unless in BOM
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes advanced analytics are included; commercial shortfall

Statement: BI Publisher configuration for documents confirmed in Scope and Design only; additional templates are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Report delivery scope exceeds estimate if not controlled

Statement: Reports designed against configuration in place at go-live; post-go-live configuration changes that affect report output are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Ongoing report maintenance consumed by implementation team rather than AMS

Statement: Client defines all report requirements (fields, filters, grouping, calculation logic); APPSolve translates agreed requirements into OTBI configuration
Risk_If_Invalid: Reports delivered do not meet business need due to incomplete requirements

Statement: UAT is led and owned by the client; APPSolve facilitates and supports but does not sign off UAT on client's behalf
Risk_If_Invalid: UAT delays; client expects APPSolve to own test sign-off

Statement: Client prepares business UAT test scripts aligned to their processes; APPSolve provides CRP configuration scripts only
Risk_If_Invalid: Inadequate UAT coverage; defects discovered post-go-live

Statement: Standard plan: CRP1 (Design Validation) + CRP2 (End-to-End Validation) + 1 UAT cycle; additional CRP cycles or second UAT are Change Requests
Risk_If_Invalid: Schedule overrun and resource cost overrun from repeated test cycles

Statement: Client provides sufficient business users for UAT; delays from client unavailability are client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: UAT critical path delayed; go-live date at risk

Statement: Configuration defects (APPSolve errors) remediated at no cost; defects from client requirement gaps or data issues are Change Requests
Risk_If_Invalid: Scope disputes over defect ownership; margin erosion from absorbing non-APPSolve defects

Statement: Stable third-party test environments required for SIT before integration testing commences
Risk_If_Invalid: Integration testing blocked; SIT delayed; go-live date at risk

Statement: Performance and load testing of Oracle Cloud is Oracle's SaaS responsibility; APPSolve does not conduct infrastructure performance testing
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expects APPSolve to provide performance testing; expectation mismatch

Statement: One quarterly Oracle update regression test cycle included in implementation scope; additional cycles due to delayed go-live are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Delayed go-live introduces multiple quarterly update regression cycles not in budget

Statement: Train-the-trainer (TTT) delivery model is the default; end-user training cascade is client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Low end-user adoption; client expects APPSolve to train all employees directly

Statement: All training delivered in English; translation is client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Language barrier reduces training effectiveness; adoption risk in non-English-speaking subsidiaries

Statement: Training uses APPSolve quick reference guides and live system demos; custom eLearning modules or narrated video are excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expects polished LMS-hosted eLearning content not in scope

Statement: Client ensures TTT participants attend all training sessions; rescheduling caused by client unavailability may be a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Training quality reduced; rescheduling costs absorbed by APPSolve

Statement: Oracle University training courses are excluded; client engages Oracle University directly
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes Oracle University is included in APPSolve's fees

Statement: APPSolve recommends Oracle Cloud Learning Subscription for system administrators; this is a client action outside APPSolve's scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Unsustainable system administration post-go-live; support dependency on APPSolve

Statement: Go-live date confirmed in Mobilize phase; cutover plan and checklist produced before production migration
Risk_If_Invalid: Uncontrolled cutover; production migration risks not assessed in advance

Statement: Production migration window is a weekend (Fri evening to Sun evening); business-day migrations require specific risk acceptance by client
Risk_If_Invalid: Business-day migration impacts HR operations; data integrity risk during live transactions

Statement: Client enforces data freeze from start of production migration window; transactions in source system during freeze are not reflected in Oracle HCM
Risk_If_Invalid: Data loss; divergence between source and Oracle HCM; reconciliation cost

Statement: Go/no-go decision point defined in cutover plan; client holds final go/no-go authority
Risk_If_Invalid: APPSolve proceeding to go-live against client wishes; liability exposure

Statement: Parallel payroll run INCLUDED by default where Oracle HCM replaces a payroll-connected system; duration and reconciliation agreed in Scope and Design
Risk_If_Invalid: Client receives parallel run deliverable not scoped/priced if conditions (HCM-CUT-008) are not clearly stated

Statement: Legacy HR system decommissioning and data archival is client's responsibility and is excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes APPSolve will shut down old system; scope dispute

Statement: Written client confirmation required before production migration proceeds; APPSolve will not go live without documented client readiness sign-off
Risk_If_Invalid: Premature go-live; accountability disputes if issues arise post-cutover

Statement: Parallel run conditions: (a) applies to payroll interface outputs only — not native Oracle payroll; (b) payroll calculations remain payroll provider's responsibility; (c) client payroll team owns reconciliation; (d) not applicable where HCM does not replace a payroll-connected system
Risk_If_Invalid: Parallel run misread as payroll processing obligation; APPSolve drawn into payroll compliance activities

Statement: 4-week hypercare is the contractual default; business hours only (08:00-17:00 SAST Mon-Fri); scope = defect resolution and stabilisation only; enhancements excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: Production issues unresolved; client unsupported after go-live

Statement: Contractual hypercare SLAs: P1 = 2-hour response; P2 = 4-hour; P3 = next business day; business hours only; extended hours are separately priced
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expects 24x7 hypercare support not priced into engagement

Statement: Excluded from hypercare: enhancements; new scope requests; Change Requests; training and user adoption support beyond hypercare plan
Risk_If_Invalid: Scope creep during hypercare; margin erosion from absorbing new work as bug fixes

Statement: Formal hypercare exit review and documented handover required before transition to AMS or internal IT support
Risk_If_Invalid: Unmanaged transition; support gaps between hypercare end and AMS start

Statement: Extended hypercare beyond minimum agreed period available at APPSolve standard rate card; must be agreed in writing before hypercare end date
Risk_If_Invalid: Unbudgeted resource allocation if hypercare extends without commercial agreement

Statement: Organisational Change Management (OCM) is excluded from base scope; client appoints internal Change Manager
Risk_If_Invalid: Low user adoption; HR team resistance undermines implementation ROI

Statement: Change management strategy, communications plan, and employee engagement programme are client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Client attributes adoption failure to APPSolve; reputational risk

Statement: Where client does not appoint an internal Change Manager, APPSolve accepts no liability for user adoption outcomes
Risk_If_Invalid: APPSolve drawn into change management activities not scoped or priced

Statement: APPSolve can provide optional OCM consulting as a separately scoped and priced engagement; not included in base HCM implementation
Risk_If_Invalid: Client unclear on what is included; expectation mismatch on OCM services

Statement: All third-party systems requiring integration with Oracle HCM must have documented, available APIs or standard file exchange interfaces
Risk_If_Invalid: Integration feasibility unknown at scoping; rework if integration is infeasible with available API

Statement: Client manages all commercial and technical engagement with third-party vendors; APPSolve not responsible for vendor delays or costs
Risk_If_Invalid: Third-party delays block integration milestone; APPSolve project timeline impacted

Statement: Third-party vendors provide stable non-production test environments for OIC integration testing before SIT commences
Risk_If_Invalid: SIT blocked; integration testing deferred; go-live date at risk

Statement: Number of third-party integrations is as documented in SOW; each additional integration is a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Integration scope underestimated; significant additional OIC design and development effort

Statement: Third-party API or file format changes after integration design is complete are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Rework of completed OIC integration not budgeted; delivery timeline impact

Statement: APPSolve is an Oracle integration partner only; payroll calculation, tax, statutory filing, and payroll compliance remain the payroll provider's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Payroll compliance failures attributed to APPSolve integration; legal liability risk

Statement: Client appoints a Project Sponsor with authority to approve scope decisions, Change Requests, and go/no-go decisions
Risk_If_Invalid: Decision-making paralysis; project delays without empowered sponsor

Statement: Client appoints a dedicated HR Project Lead participating full-time or near-full-time throughout implementation
Risk_If_Invalid: Slow design decisions; resource bottlenecks on client side; timeline delays

Statement: Client makes available functional SMEs (HR, payroll, IT) for workshops, design reviews, testing, and training as per project plan
Risk_If_Invalid: Workshop quality reduced; design gaps from absent SMEs; defects in UAT

Statement: Client reviews and approves APPSolve deliverables within agreed turnaround (standard: 5 business days); delays are client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Project critical path delayed by slow approvals; go-live date at risk

Statement: Client performs all data extraction, cleansing, preparation, and loading; data stewards assigned per entity
Risk_If_Invalid: Data quality failures cause migration rework; delivery overrun

Statement: Client provides all business rules, HR policy documents, and process documentation required for Oracle HCM configuration
Risk_If_Invalid: Configuration built on undocumented or incorrect business rules; rework at go-live

Statement: Client obtains all internal approvals required for go-live (exec sponsors, IT governance, DPO, works councils where applicable)
Risk_If_Invalid: Go-live blocked by internal governance failure; timeline impact

Statement: Client is responsible for all internal communication to employees and managers regarding the Oracle HCM implementation
Risk_If_Invalid: User confusion at go-live; helpdesk overload; adoption failure

Statement: Client procures all required Oracle licences before implementation commences; APPSolve not responsible for licence compliance
Risk_If_Invalid: Implementation delayed by licence availability; licence overrun costs borne by client

Statement: Client provides after-hours premises access where required (weekend cutover, on-call); delays from access restrictions are client's risk
Risk_If_Invalid: Cutover blocked; go-live deferred; hypercare team unable to respond on-site

Statement: Remote-first delivery; default on-site = UAT support + Go-Live support only; all other activities (kick-off, CRP1, CRP2) are remote
Risk_If_Invalid: Client expects on-site delivery throughout; cost overrun if additional on-site days absorbed

Statement: Travel costs for UAT support and Go-Live support (and any additional on-site days in SOW) are for client's account; travel approval process agreed before travel
Risk_If_Invalid: APPSolve absorbs travel costs not agreed commercially; margin erosion

Statement: All deliverables and communication in English; translation is client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Communication gaps in multi-language environments; documentation unusable by non-English teams

Statement: Delivery methodology is OUM-aligned: Mobilize > Scope and Design > Prototype > Validate > Deploy > Evolve; client accepts this methodology
Risk_If_Invalid: Methodology disputes; client expects different delivery framework

Statement: Named resources committed for engagement duration; substitution only with prior notice and equivalent-or-greater seniority resource
Risk_If_Invalid: Key person departure disrupts delivery; client confidence at risk

Statement: Oracle subscription, licence, and hosting fees are payable directly to Oracle by client and are not included in APPSolve's commercial proposal
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes Oracle fees are bundled in APPSolve's pricing; commercial shortfall

Statement: Implementation timeline assumes timely client decisions, resource availability, and data readiness; material changes require timeline revision via Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Timeline overrun attributed to APPSolve when caused by client delays

Statement: Configuration complies with SA legislation (BCEA, EEA, POPIA, LRA) as at design sign-off date; post-sign-off legislative changes are a Change Request
Risk_If_Invalid: Post-go-live legislative non-compliance if law changes and configuration is not updated

Statement: Multi-year engagements subject to annual CPI escalation on 1 March each year unless fixed rates agreed in SOW
Risk_If_Invalid: Rate disputes for long-running projects without confirmed escalation clauses

Statement: APPSolve maximum liability limited to total fees paid under the relevant SOW as per APPSolve's standard Master Services Agreement
Risk_If_Invalid: Unlimited liability exposure without MSA in place before implementation commences

Statement: Oracle Fusion Global Payroll (native) is excluded; APPSolve implements payroll interface only
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes Oracle native payroll is included; commercial shortfall and delivery mismatch

Statement: Organisational Change Management (OCM) is excluded from base scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Low adoption; client expects embedded OCM; expectation mismatch

Statement: Custom software development, OAF personalisation, and VBCS application development are excluded; assessed and priced separately if required
Risk_If_Invalid: Bespoke development underestimated; delivery overrun; technical debt

Statement: Hardware, infrastructure, networking, and data centre services are excluded (Oracle SaaS is cloud-hosted)
Risk_If_Invalid: Client budgets for infrastructure not required; or expects APPSolve to provision cloud hardware

Statement: Oracle EPM (Workforce Planning, PBCS, Narrative Reporting) is excluded; workforce budgeting beyond HCM analytics is out of scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes headcount planning tool is included; feature gap discovered post-go-live

Statement: Oracle University training courses are excluded; available directly from Oracle
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes Oracle training is bundled; commercial shortfall

Statement: Support, maintenance, and enhancement of client's legacy HR system(s) during or after implementation is excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: APPSolve drawn into legacy system support not scoped or priced

Statement: Data archival and legacy system decommissioning after go-live is excluded
Risk_If_Invalid: Client assumes APPSolve will decommission old HR system; scope dispute

Statement: Third-party vendor-side integration development, API changes, and vendor project management are excluded from APPSolve scope
Risk_If_Invalid: Third-party costs and delays incorrectly attributed to APPSolve scope

Statement: POPIA compliance programme, legal advice, and Information Officer duties are excluded; client retains sole POPIA responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: POPIA compliance failure; legal liability misattributed to APPSolve

Statement: Level 1 end-user helpdesk support (password resets, navigation queries) is excluded from implementation scope; handled by client IT or AMS post-go-live
Risk_If_Invalid: Helpdesk volume overwhelms APPSolve implementation team; delivery focus lost

Statement: Preparation and submission of statutory regulatory reports (EEA2/EEA4, WSP/ATR, PAYE/UIF/SDL) is excluded; APPSolve configures data; submission is client's responsibility
Risk_If_Invalid: Statutory non-compliance attributed to APPSolve; legal liability risk
